subcodes.first_line: O thou who seekest deliverance! Let thy joy and gladness and grief be for God alone. In truth be thou joyous, in truth be thou assured, and from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا فرج لک ان تجعل فرحک و سرورک و حزنک لله وحده بحق مسرور باش و بحق مطمئن و از
subcodes.subjects: @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
